sentences.target: Mon avocat arrive tout à l'heure.

translations.fr: Mon avocat arrive tout à l'heure.
translations.es: Mi abogado llega en un rato.
translations.it: Il mio avvocato arriva tra poco.
translations.pt: Meu advogado chega daqui a pouco.
translations.vi: Luật sư của tôi sắp đến.
translations.hi: मेरा वकील जल्द आ रहा है।
translations.ja: 私の弁護士がもうすぐ来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agrees in gender/number with the noun it modifies ('avocat').
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase referring to a legal professional.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); intransitive, with 'avocat' as subject.
Adverb functioning as an intensifier within the fixed time expression 'tout à l'heure'.
Preposition; part of the idiomatic adverbial phrase 'à l'heure' forming 'tout à l'heure'.
Elided definite article before vowel; binds to 'heure' in the expression.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à' in the idiomatic time phrase.

sentences.target: Je coupe de l'avocat pour la salade.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kup də lavɔka puʁ la salad/

translations.fr: Je coupe de l'avocat pour la salade.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kup də lavɔka puʁ la salad/
translations.en: I'm cutting some avocado for the salad.
translations.es: Estoy cortando aguacate para la ensalada.
translations.de: Ich schneide Avocado für den Salat.
translations.pt: Estou cortando abacate para a salada.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cắt bơ cho món salad.
translations.nl: Ik snijd avocado voor de salade.
translations.hi: मैं सलाद के लिए एवोकाडो काट रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Saya sedang memotong alpukat untuk salad.
translations.ja: サラダ用にアボカドを切っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); transitive.
Preposition introducing a partitive construction with the following elided article.
Elided definite article; with 'de' forms the partitive 'de l'' before a vowel-initial noun.
Common noun (food item); direct object of 'coupe' within the partitive 'de l'avocat'.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement.
Definite article (feminine singular) modifying 'salade'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu aimes l'avocat dans tes tacos.

translations.fr: Tu aimes l'avocat dans tes tacos.
translations.en: You like avocado in your tacos.
translations.es: Te gusta el aguacate en tus tacos.
translations.de: Du magst Avocado in deinen Tacos.
translations.it: Ti piace l'avocado nei tuoi tacos.
translations.ko: 너는 타코에 아보카도를 넣는 걸 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你喜欢在玉米饼里放牛油果。
translations.yue: 你鍾意喺你嘅墨西哥夾餅入面加牛油果。
translations.ru: Тебе нравится авокадо в твоих тако.
translations.pt: Você gosta de abacate nos seus tacos.
translations.he: אתה אוהב אבוקדו בתוך הטאקו שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn thích bơ trong bánh taco của mình.
translations.ar: أنت تحب الأفوكادو في التاكو الخاص بك.
translations.nl: Je houdt van avocado in je taco's.
translations.uk: Тобі подобається авокадо в твоїх тако.
translations.hi: तुम्हें अपने टैकोज़ में एवोकाडो पसंद है।
translations.el: Σου αρέσει το αβοκάντο στα τάκο σου.
translations.nb: Du liker avokado i tacoene dine.
translations.id: Kamu suka alpukat di taco kamu.
translations.sv: Du gillar avokado i dina tacos.
translations.ro: Îți place avocado în tacosurile tale.
translations.cs: Máš rád avokádo ve svých tacos.
translations.da: Du kan lide avocado i dine tacos.
translations.ja: あなたはタコスにアボカドを入れるのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular); transitive.
Elided definite article before vowel; modifies 'avocat'.
Common noun (food item); direct object of 'aimes'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), plural form; modifies 'tacos'.
Borrowed common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Cet avocat répond vite aux messages.

translations.fr: Cet avocat répond vite aux messages.
translations.en: This lawyer replies quickly to messages.
translations.es: Este abogado responde rápido a los mensajes.
translations.de: Dieser Anwalt antwortet schnell auf Nachrichten.
translations.it: Questo avvocato risponde velocemente ai messaggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位律师回复消息很快。
translations.ru: Этот адвокат быстро отвечает на сообщения.
translations.pt: Este advogado responde rápido às mensagens.
translations.he: עורך הדין הזה עונה מהר להודעות.
translations.tr: Bu avukat mesajlara hızlı cevap veriyor.
translations.vi: Luật sư này trả lời tin nhắn rất nhanh.
translations.ar: هذا المحامي يرد على الرسائل بسرعة.
translations.nl: Deze advocaat reageert snel op berichten.
translations.uk: Цей адвокат швидко відповідає на повідомлення.
translations.hu: Ez az ügyvéd gyorsan válaszol az üzenetekre.
translations.hi: यह वकील संदेशों का जल्दी जवाब देता है।
translations.pl: Ten prawnik szybko odpisuje na wiadomości.
translations.el: Αυτός ο δικηγόρος απαντά γρήγορα στα μηνύματα.
translations.nb: Denne advokaten svarer raskt på meldinger.
translations.id: Pengacara ini membalas pesan dengan cepat.
translations.sv: Den här advokaten svarar snabbt på meddelanden.
translations.ro: Acest avocat răspunde rapid la mesaje.
translations.cs: Tento právník rychle odpovídá na zprávy.
translations.da: Denne advokat svarer hurtigt på beskeder.
translations.ja: この弁護士はメッセージにすぐ返信します。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular, form used before vowel/h muet); modifies 'avocat'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); typically selects an indirect complement with 'à'.
Adverb modifying the manner of the action.
Preposition in contracted form ('à' + 'les'); introduces the indirect object phrase.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'aux'.
